Package org.flowable.cmmn.model

Class EventListener

java.lang.Object
org.flowable.cmmn.model.BaseElement
org.flowable.cmmn.model.CmmnElement
org.flowable.cmmn.model.CaseElement
org.flowable.cmmn.model.PlanItemDefinition
org.flowable.cmmn.model.EventListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasExtensionAttributes, HasLifecycleListeners
Direct Known Subclasses:
GenericEventListener, SignalEventListener, TimerEventListener, UserEventListener, VariableEventListener
public abstract class EventListener extends PlanItemDefinition
Author:
Joram Barrez
